description.value:
Strength milestone — unlocked at STR 15.

Grants: Crushing Blow. Add one extra weapon damage die to your melee weapon hits (e.g. a Greataxe deals 2d12 instead of 1d12, then adds scaling and upgrade as normal).

Where Dexterity gives you more strikes, Strength makes each strike bigger.

Table reminder: roll the extra die by hand on melee hits — this card documents the milestone, the DM adjudicates the die.
